---
title: "UZIMA Fabric SQL Access"
author: "UZIMA Team"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Setup (one-time)

```r
remotes::install_github("AKU-CDIO/fabric-inbound-access", subdir = "fabriconnect", force = TRUE)
```

## Connect

```{r connect}
library(fabriconnect)
conn <- connect_to_fabric()
cat("Connected!\n")
```

## List Tables

```{r list-tables}
tables <- list_tables(conn)
knitr::kable(data.frame(Table = tables))
```

## Read Data

```{r read-data}
df <- read_table(conn, "dimenrolledparticipants")
knitr::kable(head(df))
```

## SQL Queries

```{r sql}
result <- query_tables(conn, "
  SELECT Gender, COUNT(*) AS total, AVG(Age) AS avg_age
  FROM dimenrolledparticipants
  WHERE Gender IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY Gender
")
knitr::kable(result, caption = "Demographics")
```

## Disconnect

```{r disconnect}
dbDisconnect(conn)
```
